content:
finding_id,opened_date,severity,regions_affected,brief
F-2001,2026-07-03,medium,US-EAST,Insufficient retention period applied to a subset of marketing emails for retail customers in the eastern region.
F-2002,2026-07-09,high,"US-EAST,US-WEST",Inconsistent KYC documentation requirements across regional onboarding portals — eastern and western teams using different evidence thresholds.
F-2003,2026-07-15,low,EMEA,Non-material formatting discrepancy in EMEA quarterly disclosure cover page.
F-2004,2026-07-22,high,"US-EAST,EMEA,APAC",Cross-border data transfer agreements require updating after recent regulatory amendment; affects customer data flows across multiple regional clusters.
F-2005,2026-07-30,medium,APAC,APAC region wire screening tooling experienced an unscheduled outage during which no degraded-mode procedures were activated.
F-2006,2026-08-06,medium,US-WEST,Western region payroll vendor change introduced a misalignment in the records-retention metadata.
F-2007,2026-08-14,high,"EMEA,APAC",Two regions are operating under outdated marketing-consent withdrawal procedures inconsistent with the current group standard.
